prompt:
Declaration (in builder format):

pipeline.ci("backend-api", trigger: "on_push to main")
  .parallelize(
    lint(language: "go"),
    type_check(language: "go"),
    test(framework: "ginkgo", coverage_min: 0.80),
    security_scan(tool: "snyk"))
  .if(all passed):
    .build(target: "docker", registry: "ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api")
    .deploy(env: "staging", strategy: "rolling")
    .smoke_test(timeout: "60s")
    .if(smoke_test passed):
      .deploy(env: "prod", strategy: "canary", canary_percent: 10)
  .else:
    .notify(channel: "slack", to: "#deploys")
    .block_merge()

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Pipeline name: `backend-api`
• Trigger event: push to `main` branch
• Parallel stage containing four concurrent jobs
• Job 1: lint, language Go
• Job 2: type-check, language Go
• Job 3: test, framework Ginkgo, minimum coverage threshold 80%
• Job 4: security scan, tool Snyk
• Gate condition: all four parallel jobs must pass before proceeding
• Build step: target Docker
• Docker image registry: `ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api`
• Deploy step: environment staging
• Staging deployment strategy: rolling
• Smoke test step following staging deploy
• Smoke test timeout: 60 seconds
• Gate condition: smoke test must pass before proceeding to prod
• Deploy step: environment prod
• Prod deployment strategy: canary
• Canary traffic percentage: 10%
• Else branch triggers when any of the four parallel jobs fail
• Failure notification channel: Slack
• Slack notification recipient: `#deploys`
• Merge block action on failure: `block_merge()`
• Else branch also triggers if smoke test fails (implied by nesting of the outer else)
